category.scope_note: Household refrigerating appliances comparison: China domestic compliance vs Tanzania TBS mandatory conformity (PVoC), energy labelling, and TZS/IEC 60335-2-24 requirements.

title.en: China-to-Tanzania Household Refrigerator Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国家用电冰箱进入坦桑尼亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家用電冰箱進入坦尚尼亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese household refrigerator compliance (CCC, GB 4706.13, GB 12021.2) against Tanzania TBS mandatory conformity via the PVoC programme, Certificate of Conformity and TBS mark, energy labelling/MEPS, and TZS standards adopting IEC 60335-2-24.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用电冰箱合规（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）与坦桑尼亚TBS通过PVoC计划实施的强制符合性、符合性证书与TBS标志、能效标识/MEPS及采用IEC 60335-2-24的TZS标准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用電冰箱合規（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）與坦尚尼亞TBS通過PVoC計畫實施的強制符合性、符合性證書與TBS標誌、能效標識/MEPS及採用IEC 60335-2-24的TZS標準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Tanzanian legislation, TBS PVoC programme requirements, applicable TZS/IEC standards, energy-labelling thresholds, and Certificate of Conformity procedures with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行坦桑尼亚法律、TBS PVoC计划要求、适用的TZS/IEC标准、能效标识门槛值及符合性证书程序。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行坦尚尼亞法律、TBS PVoC計畫要求、適用的TZS/IEC標準、能效標識門檻值及符合性證書程序。

answer_first.en: Chinese household refrigerator manufacturers exporting to Tanzania face four main compliance gaps: (1) TBS mandatory conformity via the Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) programme — every regulated consignment needs a Certificate of Conformity (CoC) issued before shipment, and Chinese CCC certification does not replace it; (2) testing to TZS standards that adopt IEC 60335-2-24 (electrical safety) and the relevant IEC EMC standards — GB 4706.13/GB 4343.1 CCC reports are not automatically accepted and an IECEE CB Scheme report with a Tanzanian CoC is the usual route; (3) Tanzanian energy labelling / MEPS for refrigerators where applicable, plus the TBS mark on the product; and (4) an in-country importer of record to clear the goods at Dar es Salaam. Tanzania uses 230 V / 50 Hz (same 50 Hz as China, different nominal voltage from China's 220/380 V). R-600a refrigerant is well-positioned, but charge and documentation should be confirmed against the IEC 60335-2-24 basis adopted by the relevant TZS standard. Tanzania has no EU-style horizontal RoHS, battery, or outdoor-noise regimes.
answer_first.zh: 中国家用电冰箱制造商出口坦桑尼亚面临四大合规差距：（1）TBS通过出口前符合性验证（PVoC）计划实施强制符合性——每批受管制货物在发货前须取得符合性证书（CoC），中国CCC认证不能替代；（2）依据采用IEC 60335-2-24（电气安全）及相关IEC EMC标准的TZS标准进行检测——GB 4706.13/GB 4343.1的CCC报告不被自动接受，常规路径是IECEE CB体系报告加坦桑尼亚CoC；（3）适用情况下针对电冰箱的坦桑尼亚能效标识/MEPS，以及产品上的TBS标志；（4）须有在地进口商作为记录进口方在达累斯萨拉姆清关。坦桑尼亚采用230 V/50 Hz（与中国同为50 Hz，标称电压不同于中国的220/380 V）。R-600a制冷剂条件良好，但充注量及文件应对照相关TZS标准所采用的IEC 60335-2-24基准予以确认。坦桑尼亚没有欧盟式的横向RoHS、电池或户外噪声法规体系。
answer_first.zht: 中國家用電冰箱製造商出口坦尚尼亞面臨四大合規差距：（1）TBS通過出口前符合性驗證（PVoC）計畫實施強制符合性——每批受管制貨物在發貨前須取得符合性證書（CoC），中國CCC認證不能替代；（2）依據採用IEC 60335-2-24（電氣安全）及相關IEC EMC標準的TZS標準進行檢測——GB 4706.13/GB 4343.1的CCC報告不被自動接受，常規路徑是IECEE CB體系報告加坦尚尼亞CoC；（3）適用情況下針對電冰箱的坦尚尼亞能效標識/MEPS，以及產品上的TBS標誌；（4）須有在地進口商作為記錄進口方在達累斯薩拉姆清關。坦尚尼亞採用230 V/50 Hz（與中國同為50 Hz，標稱電壓不同於中國的220/380 V）。R-600a製冷劑條件良好，但充注量及文件應對照相關TZS標準所採用的IEC 60335-2-24基準予以確認。坦尚尼亞沒有歐盟式的橫向RoHS、電池或戶外噪聲法規體系。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be set to true. Official regulator (TBS), standards body (TZS/IEC), or primary legal source preferred; local PDFs not accepted.
